zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clarell於1309年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，他的父親Sutton William Clarell22歲，母親Agnes Waleries13歲。他與Isabella St Philibert結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1363年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clarell was born in 1309, in Aldwarke, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sutton William Clarell, was 22 and his mother, Agnes Waleries, was 13. He married Isabella St Philibert. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1363, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clarell est né en 1309, à Aldwarke, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sutton William Clarell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes Waleries, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Isabella St Philibert. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1363, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Lui sposato Isabella St Philibert. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1363, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarellが1309年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父Sutton William Clarellは22歳，母Agnes Waleriesは13歳であった。Isabella St Philibertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1363年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarell(이)가 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sutton William Clarell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Waleries(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Isabella St Philibert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clarell родился в 1309 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sutton William Clarell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Waleries, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella St Philibert. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1363 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
